rationale: Both papers centrally examine determinants of consumer variety seeking, and each uses a time-related driver in a social-role/relationship context (relationship time perspective in the cited paper; parenting-motivation-induced time crunch in the citing paper). The citing note says it extends prior variety-seeking work by adding a social-role antecedent and mechanism, so this reference is plausibly a substantive conceptual prior source rather than a generic mention.
